title: Memory
description: How the agent persists its own knowledge and manages the constraint of limited context

features.title: Persistent auto memory
features.description: The agent automatically saves notes and learnings across sessions without manual effort

features.title: Conversation resume
features.description: Resume a past conversation with its full context intact

features.title: Context compaction
features.description: Gracefully handles long conversations by summarizing or compacting context when approaching window limits
